case_title: MARCOS E. PENA GUZMAN VS. PAVLOS KARAMANIDIS

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE CONTINUED TO CURE SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-25-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-01-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MARCOS E. PENA GUZMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PAVLOS KARAMANIDIS IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT: BOTH PARTIES HAVE EXPRESSED INTEREST TO HAVE PLAINTIFF PERFORM WORK IN EXCHANGE FOR DEFENDANT PURCHASING EXERCISE EQUIPMENT FOR PLAINTIFF. PARTIES SHOULD REDUCE THE AGREEMENT AND SPECIFIC TERMS AND DEADLINES TO WRITING AND BE SIGNED BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-27-2021 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO JUN-25-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MARCOS PENA GUZMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PAVLOS KARAMANIDIS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WILL NOT WAIVE UNTIMELY SERVICE AND REQUESTS TIME TO CURE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $240.85 FILED BY GUZMAN, MARCOS E. PENA AS TO DEFENDANT KARAMANIDIS, PAVLOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-27-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
